skill.name: pexoai-agent
skill.description: Use this skill when the user wants to produce a short video (5-120 seconds). Supports any video type: product ads, TikTok/Instagram/YouTube content, brand videos, explainers, social clips. USE FOR: video production, AI video, make a video, product video, brand video, promotional clip, explainer video, short video.
skill.summary: AI-powered short video creation agent for product ads, social media content, and brand videos
skill.author: pexoai

security_audit.summary: Evaluated 534 static findings across 13 files. All detected patterns are legitimate usage for video production functionality. Shell commands (curl) are intentional API communication mechanism. Environment access is required for PEXO_API_KEY authentication. Network requests target only the official pexo.ai API. Filesystem access is limited to user config directory ~/.pexo. No evidence of malicious behavior, credential exfiltration, or command injection vulnerabilities.

medium_findings.title: Shell Command Execution for API Communication
medium_findings.description: Scripts invoke curl commands to communicate with Pexo API. This is intentional design - the skill is a CLI wrapper for the Pexo video generation service. Commands use hardcoded API endpoints and API key authentication.
medium_findings.confidence_reasoning: All curl invocations target hardcoded pexo.ai endpoints with Bearer token authentication. No user input reaches shell commands. Verified by reviewing SKILL.md workflow steps.

low_findings.title: Environment Variable Access for API Authentication
low_findings.description: Scripts read PEXO_API_KEY and PEXO_BASE_URL from config file or environment. Required for API authentication.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: API key access is standard authentication pattern. Key is used only for Bearer token in Authorization header to pexo.ai. No exfiltration detected.

low_findings.title: Filesystem Access for User Configuration
low_findings.description: Scripts read from ~/.pexo/config for API credentials. Standard user-level config pattern.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: Config file location is user-owned directory ~/.pexo. No system file access. Read-only for credentials.

low_findings.title: Hardcoded API URLs to Official Service
low_findings.description: Scripts reference hardcoded pexo.ai endpoints. These are intended API targets.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: All URLs point to official pexo.ai domain. Verified homepage and repository in SKILL.md frontmatter.

low_findings.title: System Reconnaissance (Version Checks)
low_findings.description: Scripts check for curl, jq, file utilities and OS information. Standard diagnostic pattern.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: Version checks are diagnostic tools required to verify runtime dependencies. No data exfiltration pattern.

low_findings.title: Weak Cryptographic Algorithm Warnings (MD5/SHA1 in Comments)
low_findings.description: Static analysis flagged MD5/SHA1 references. These appear in troubleshooting documentation discussing OSS signature algorithms, not actual crypto usage.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: Flagged patterns are in documentation and error messages, not actual cryptographic operations. False positive rate is high for this pattern.

dangerous_patterns.title: Static Analysis Heuristic: Suspicious Combination
dangerous_patterns.description: Code execution + network + credential access flagged as suspicious pattern. This is expected for API-wrapper tools.
dangerous_patterns.confidence_reasoning: Heuristic detected shell commands with network and env_access. This is the intended design for a CLI API wrapper skill. No malicious combination found after manual review.

content.user_title: Create professional short videos with AI
content.value_statement: Creating marketing videos requires specialized skills and expensive tools. Pexo AI handles scriptwriting, shot composition, transitions, and music while you focus on describing your vision.
actual_capabilities: Generate short videos (5-120 seconds) from text descriptions
Create product advertisements, social media content, and brand videos
Support multiple aspect ratios (16:9, 9:16, 1:1) for different platforms
Handle uploaded images, videos, and audio as source material
Present multiple preview options for user selection
Provide download URLs and project management links
limitations: Requires PEXO_API_KEY for authentication (free account needed)
Video generation takes 15-20 minutes per short video
Cannot process video longer than 120 seconds
May require clarification questions for vague requests

use_cases.title: Social media content creation
use_cases.description: Quickly create TikTok, Instagram Reels, and YouTube Shorts from a brief description. Perfect for content marketers and social media managers who need consistent video output.

use_cases.title: Product video production
use_cases.description: Generate professional product ads without video editing skills. Upload product images and describe the video you want to see.

use_cases.title: Brand video development
use_cases.description: Create explainer videos and brand stories for websites and campaigns. Describe your brand message and let AI handle the creative direction.

prompt_templates.title: Basic video request
prompt_templates.prompt: I want a product video for my new sneakers

prompt_templates.title: Video with uploaded image
prompt_templates.prompt: Create a promotional video using this product image
prompt_templates.scenario: When user has uploaded files to attach

prompt_templates.title: Platform-specific content
prompt_templates.prompt: Make a 9:16 vertical video for Instagram Reels about [product topic]

prompt_templates.title: Revising an existing video
prompt_templates.prompt: Change the style to be more energetic and add upbeat music

output_examples.input: I want a 30-second product video for my handmade soap collection
output_examples.output: Video file ready for download + project page link + option to request revisions

output_examples.input: Create a brand story video about sustainability
output_examples.output: Multiple preview options (A, B, C) presented for user selection before final generation

output_examples.input: Make a TikTok video about our new coffee blend
output_examples.output: Final video delivered with 9:16 aspect ratio, optimized for mobile viewing

best_practices: Be specific about video style and mood to get better results
Upload reference images when available to guide the AI
Respond to clarification questions promptly to keep the workflow moving
Provide feedback on generated previews to improve final output
anti_patterns: Do not add technical parameters (duration, aspect ratio) unless the user explicitly mentions them
Do not modify the user's message - relay their exact words to Pexo for best results
Do not include your own creative ideas - let Pexo's professional judgment guide the production
Do not interrupt the polling process during video generation

faq.question: How long does video generation take?
faq.answer: Most short videos (5-120 seconds) are ready within 15-20 minutes. Complex requests may take longer.

faq.question: What formats does Pexo support?
faq.answer: You can generate videos in 16:9 (landscape), 9:16 (vertical), and 1:1 (square) aspect ratios.

faq.question: How do I get a PEXO_API_KEY?
faq.answer: Sign up at https://pexo.ai, go to your profile, click API Keys, and create a new key. Free accounts include credits to get started.

faq.question: Can I upload my own media?
faq.answer: Yes. You can upload images, videos, and audio files. These are attached using special tags in your message.

faq.question: What if I want to revise the video?
faq.answer: You can request changes after seeing the preview or final output. Just describe what you want different.

faq.question: Why did the video fail with a credit error?
faq.answer: You need sufficient credits in your Pexo account. Visit https://pexo.ai/home to purchase additional credits.
